titleStmt.title: SII 38.303: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 303. (A.R. No. 303 of 1912.) ATTI, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west wall, Kariyaperumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Records that Āḷappirandāṉ alias Rājarāja Sambhuvarāyaṉ made a gift of three vēli of land, called Kaṇḍañchēr, reclaimed by Tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ at Periyanallūr in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam, along with taxes levied on it such as poṉvari, kāśukaḍamai, āyam veṭṭi, taṉiy-āḷ etc; to the shrine of Veṇṇaikkāḍiaruḷiṉa-piḷḷai ie., (Kṛishṇa) as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam, founded by Ammaināchchi alias Pālāṟṟil Veṉṟār at the temple of Ediriliśōḻaviṇṇagar emberumāṉ in Atti in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam.
It is also stated that taxes such as kaḍamai, and kuḍimai inclusive of āḷ-amañji, and tēvai were ordered to be remitted to the tāṉattār of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭa kopāladevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu Āṭimātamutal Āḷappiṟantāṉāṉa Irācarāca campuvarāyaṉeṉ ve
ṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu Attiyil Etirilicoḻa viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tirumuṟṟattu Ammai nācciyāṉa pālāṟṟil veṉṟār Ukantaruḷivitta veṇṇaikkāṭiyaru
ḷiṉa piḷḷaikku kāliyūr koṭṭattu periyanallūril Āṟṟukkāṟ l nāyaṉār tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ tiruttiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa kaṇṭañcer muṉṟuveli nilam poṉva
ri kācukaṭamai Uḷḷiṭṭa kācāyaṅkaḷum Āyamum veṭṭi taṉiyāḷum Eṭuttukkoṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nellāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa Ivaṟku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭo
m Innāḷ mutal Āḷamañci tevai Uṭpaṭa Ikkoyil tāṉattārkkeṟa kaṭamaikuṭimai pokkaṟuppate .
Digital edition of SII 38.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
